about.title: About
about.p1: CheoTech Studio builds digital products that people enjoy using — from responsive websites and mobile apps to browser extensions and games. We focus on clean design, smooth performance, and thoughtful user experience.
about.p2: Whether you need a new site, an app, or a custom tool, we'd love to hear from you.

contact.title: Get in touch
